            GELINA:                                               2366400100012 
             Nominal average beam energy:  100 MeV                2366400100013 
             Nominal average peak current:  70 uA                 2366400100014 
             Repetition rate:              400 Hz                 2366400100015 
             Pulse width:          typically 1 ns (FWHM)          2366400100016 
             Primary neutron production target:                   2366400100017 
                U-Mo alloy with 10wt% of Mo, depleted uranium     2366400100018 
             Moderator:                                           2366400100019 
                Unmoderated flux configuration                    2366400100020 
             Flight path direction:                               2366400100021

SAMPLE     Natural carbon disk                                    2366400100024 
            Thickness:       0.0176(1) at/b                       2366400100025 
            Sample mass:     27.70(1) g                           2366400100026 
            Surface dimension: 100.0(1) mm diam.x 2.0(1) mm thick 2366400100027 
           (6-C-12,ENR=0.9894)                                    2366400100028

METHOD     (TOF)                                                  2366400100030 
            GELINA:                                               2366400100031 
             Source-scattering distance:      27.037(5) m         2366400100032 
             Source-fission chamber distance: 25.667(5) m         2366400100033 
             TOF resolution:                          5 ns        2366400100034 
             Energy resolution (at 1 MeV):            5 keV       2366400100035 
DETECTOR   (SCIN) EJ301 and EJ315 liquid organic scintillators,   2366400100036 
            (cylindrical, 5.08 cm diam.x5.08 cm high, 105.9 cm3), 2366400100037 
             which front face is placed at a distance of          2366400100038 
             0.295(1) m from the center of the sample.            2366400100039 
            Four detectors (two in horizontal, two at 60 deg with 2366400100040 
             the horizontal plane facing downward) at each of the 2366400100041 
             following angles (deg):                              2366400100042 
              163.8(1), 142.8(1), 121.7(1), 100.6(1), 79.4(1),    2366400100043 
              58.3(1), 37.2(1), 16.2(1).                          2366400100044 
            The scintillator absolute neutron response was        2366400100045 
             determined in a TOF experiment using carbon (neutron 2366400100046 
             elastic scattering cross section standard) as        2366400100047 
             scattering sample.                                   2366400100048 
           (FISCH) UF4 deposited on Al (8 deposits of 70 mm diam.,2366400100049 
            4.095(4) mg/cm2)                                      2366400100050 
CORRECTION - Dead time                                            2366400100051 
           - Background subtraction                               2366400100052 
             . Photon-induced events discriminated via pulse      2366400100053 
               shape analysis                                     2366400100054 
             . Neutron background - room return neutron           2366400100055 
               determination and sample-in/sample-out             2366400100056 
               measurements                                       2366400100057 
           - Multiple scattering                                  2366400100058 
               Correction factor determined via Monte Carlo       2366400100059 
               simulations.                                       2366400100060 
           - Elastic/inelastic reaction separation                2366400100061 
               via neutron spectrometry (deconvolution of the     2366400100062 
               detector response).                                2366400100063

               modelling,                                         2366400100067
